M1710_WHEN_CONFUSD M1710 (M0570) When Confused This field indicates when the patient is confused (Reported or Observed Within the Last 14 Days). 00 = Never
01 = In new or complex situations only
02 = On awakening or at night only
03 = During the day and evening, but not constantly
04 = Constantly
NA = NA - Patient nonresponsive CHAR 2 x x x x x x
M1720_WHEN_ANXIOUS M1720 (M0580)
